whatThisPluginAdds.text: Layout Builder adds a visual page composition workflow with layout areas, widgets, reusable widgets, presets, and reversible layout edits.

surfaceOutcome.text: Editors can add, reorder, resize, and edit page widgets in admin. Visitors receive the saved layout graph as ordinary public output without authoring markers.

developers.text: Registries and typed Actions provide stable extension points for widget definitions, layout widgets, presets, and public render data.

teams.text: Teams can compose pages and reuse approved sections without asking a developer to build a new template for each page.
